title: Why Switzerland has 25 Gbit internet and America doesn't
content: Analysis of infrastructure policy differences enabling Switzerland's superior broadband capabilities

title: People would rather have an Amazon warehouse in their backyard than a data center
content: A new poll shows that the debate over data centers is far from settled.

title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code
content: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.
